steps.title: Identify the parallel meaning signal
steps.content: The key clue is the parallel structure not only ______ steps but also illuminate. Since “illuminate” means to reveal or clarify something, the blank needs a verb expressing how paleontologists recognize evolutionary steps.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Discern means to perceive or identify, which captures how paleontologists use fossil evidence to understand evolutionary steps. The other three choices describe different actions that don't work. That matches choice C — C is correct.
